tech_news.title: Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft’s new Xbox chief is getting ready to improve Game Pass pricing. A leaked memo suggests that a “better value equation” is coming soon.

tech_news.title: You can make a multicolor MacBook Neo out of Apple’s spare parts - The Verge
tech_news.description: You don’t have to choose just one color for the MacBook Neo, as MacWorld found that you can order spare parts in different colors, including silver, indigo, citrus, and blush.

tech_news.description: Shadow of the Horned Rat, Chaos Gate, Dark Omen, Fire Warrior and more have returned.

tech_news.title: Careful, huge spoilers are out for James Bond game 007: First Light, following an Indonesian Game Rating leak - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: IO Interactive's 007: First Light spoilers have surfaced online alongside other upcoming video game leaks.

tech_news.title: Xbox Shoots Down ‘Fable’ Delay Rumors, Must Dodge ‘GTA 6’ - Forbes
tech_news.description: Fable will come out in the fall of 2026, Xbox reiterates, after viral rumors said it would be delayed to dodge GTA 6.

tech_news.title: Pragmata is just OK, but it could’ve been great - The Verge
tech_news.description: Resident Evil developer Capcom has a brand-new franchise in the works with the sci-fi shooter Pragmata, which launches on April 17th on the Switch 2, PS5, Xbox, and PC.
